tools/migrate/cmd.purpose: Organisational parent for thin CLI entrypoints that operate on the migration toolchain. Its sole child, viewgen/, is a binary that generates ClickHouse view SQL from the Ent schema; all real logic lives in sibling library packages under tools/migrate/, never here.

patterns.name: Thin entrypoint delegation
patterns.description: Each cmd/<name>/main.go only parses flags and calls the corresponding library function — no SQL generation, schema inspection, or file I/O beyond the final delegated call.
patterns.example: // viewgen/main.go: parse -schema and -out flags, then viewgen.GenerateFile(schema, out)

patterns.name: stdlib flag over Cobra/Viper
patterns.description: Single-purpose tools with one or two flags use the stdlib flag package, not a command framework.
patterns.example: schema := flag.String("schema", "openmeter/ent/schema", "path to ent schema"); flag.Parse()

patterns.name: exitf for error reporting
patterns.description: Errors exit via a local exitf helper (fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, ...) + os.Exit(1)), not log.Fatal or panic, for clean CI output.
patterns.example: func exitf(format string, args ...any) { fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, format+"\n", args...); os.Exit(1) }

patterns.name: One sub-command per directory
patterns.description: Each cmd/<name>/ directory holds exactly one main.go producing one binary. Add a sibling directory rather than a second command in an existing one.

key_file_guides.role: Thin CLI wrapper: parses -schema and -out flags and delegates to viewgen.GenerateFile.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Must not import app/common or any openmeter/ domain package — only the schema path and the viewgen library are needed.

anti_patterns: Adding SQL generation or schema-inspection logic in main.go instead of the sibling tools/migrate/viewgen library.
Importing app/common or any openmeter/ domain package from a cmd entrypoint.
Using Cobra or Viper for a tool that only needs one or two flags.
Adding a second command to an existing cmd/<name>/ package instead of creating a sibling directory.
Using log.Fatal or panic instead of the local exitf helper for error exits.

decisions.decision: Library logic lives in tools/migrate/viewgen, not in main.go.
decisions.rationale: Lets view_parity_test.go call viewgen.GenerateSQL directly without shelling out, keeping tests fast and free of binary build dependencies.
